name: continuim
description: Policy-enforced autonomous procurement for stockout emergencies.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n control,procurement,evidence,web -c cyan,yellow,magenta,green "npm run dev:control" "npm run dev:procurement" "npm run dev:evidence" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.test: node --import tsx --test packages/security/src/capability.test.ts services/verification/src/policy.test.ts services/verification/src/scenarios.test.ts services/agent/src/loop.test.ts services/agent/src/learning.test.ts services/procurement/src/authorize.test.ts services/procurement/src/index.test.ts services/control-plane/src/monitor.test.ts services/control-plane/src/store.test.ts services/zero-adapter/src/adapter.test.ts services/procurement/src/email.test.ts services/zero-adapter/src/transport.test.ts
scripts.build:web: cd Continuum && npm ci && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run check && npm run build:web
